response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — key requirements for this role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems programming aptitude, but the career gap and absence of proven work with routing tiles, real-time traffic integration, or low-latency map data pipelines raise significant concerns.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO usage
Demonstrated systems programming experience with DLang, async I/O, and low-latency apps
Strong track record of learning new technologies and contributing across full stack
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or geospatial pipelines
Career gap since October 2025 raises questions about current technical engagement
Lacks explicit experience with routing tile generation, map data freshness, or navigation QA systems
